chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-992 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 09.10.2025 M/s. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Hayat Muhakkad Khan and Kiran Manzoor, Advocates a/w Petitioners. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w ASI Qalandar Bux Brohi and SIP Muhammad Ayoob. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ------ Learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh files statements on behalf of respondents No.4 & 6, taken on record. The police officials present, submit that they have not confined or illegally detained the alleged missing person; however, the petitioners in order to exert pressure upon the police so that they may not perform their paramount functions, have maintained instant petition as father of the alleged missing person is proclaimed offender in Crime No.200/2020, registered with Police A- Section, Thull for offence under sections 406, 420 P.P.C. Mr. Irshad Ali R. Chandio, advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the respondents No.8-16, taken on record and have also denied the involvement of the respondents in any overt act. When confronted, learned counsel for the petitioners submits that after filing of the petition, the alleged detenue has reached home, therefore, he does not wish to press instant petition as the same has become infructuous. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh as well as Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh have no objection. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
